body_excerpt: In max3421_set_address and related functions of max3421-hcd.c, there is a possible way to corrupt memory due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with physical/USB access to the device, with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In max3421_set_address and related functions of max3421-hcd.c, there is a possible way to corrupt memory due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with physical/USB acc
